violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink at the dance area bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
The hand-washing sink in the dance area bar was lacking paper towels. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the dance and lounge areas, are not tight-fitting. Inspector observed that the new weatherstripping does not adequately seal the doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the dance area bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
The hand-washing sink in the dance area bar was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
The handwashing sinks at the dance area bar are lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024

The door to the outside, located at the entrances to the dance area and lounge area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024
Chemical sanitizers were not installed at the lounge bar dish machine. Technicians arrived to install during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
The faucet at the 3-bay sink was not long enough to fill all 3 bays. Contractor placed order during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024
A leak was observed at drain to the hand sink at dance area bar. Plumber arrived during inpection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024
The edges of the stairs in the lounge area kitchen had exposed/unfinished wood. Floor under 3-bay in dance area to be sealed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024
